title: Tuition & Fees - Leads University
markdown:
## FEE STRUCTURE

At Lahore Leads University (LLU), we are committed to providing high-quality education at affordable rates. Our fee structure is designed to cater to a wide range of academic programs while ensuring accessibility to students from diverse backgrounds. Below is an overview of the tuition fees for some of our popular undergraduate,graduate programs, adp programs and post graduate (Phd) programs.

## Find Your Program
